item.title: Book-Style Magnetic Closure Photography Portfolio Box with Archival Acid-Free Linen Wrap
item.description:
Product Overview

The book-style magnetic closure photography portfolio box with archival acid-free linen wrap is purpose-built for professional photographers, fine art printers, and galleries who require museum-grade storage and presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, 18,000 sqm, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this box features acid-free, lignin-free, pH-buffered materials throughout — from the 3.0mm archival greyboard core to the Belgian linen wrap and pH-neutral adhesive. The book-style magnetic closure with N52 neodymium magnets opens like a fine volume, and the spine can be foil-stamped with the photographer’s name or collection title. Compatible with ISO 18902:2013 imaging materials storage standards. Daily output reaches 1.7 million boxes on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses.

item.title: Custom Magnetic Closure Humidor-Style Cigar Box with Spanish Cedar Lining and Digital Hygrometer
item.description:
Product Description

This humidor-style magnetic closure cigar box bridges the gap between functional humidor and luxury presentation packaging. Lined with genuine Spanish cedar (Cedrela odorata) — the gold standard for cigar aging — the interior naturally regulates humidity while imparting the characteristic cedar aroma prized by aficionados. An integrated digital hygrometer displays real-time humidity levels, and the N52 neodymium magnetic seal with full-perimeter silicone gasket maintains 68–72% RH for short to medium-term cigar storage (3–6 months with proper humidification device). The exterior is wrapped in premium leatherette or linen with gold/silver hot foil debossing for brand elevation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing with 23 years of rigid box expertise, every box passes through 15 precision QC checkpoints. ISO 9001:2015 quality management and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified, produced in an 18,000 sqm integrated facility with 220,000+ daily rigid box output.

item.title: Custom Magnetic Closure Premium Fountain Pen Display Box with Satin Tray
item.description: Magnetic closure fountain pen display box with individual satin-lined slots — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience. This presentation box combines the satisfying snap of a magnetic closure with the visual drama of a satin-lined interior that elevates any writing instrument to heirloom status. Designed for fountain pen manufacturers, luxury corporate gift programs, and collector editions, the box provides exceptional protection and presentation from retail shelf to recipient’s desk.

item.title: Luxury Cufflink Presentation Box with Magnetic Flip Lid Velvet Interior
item.description:
Product Overview

The luxury cufflink presentation box with magnetic flip lid and velvet interior is engineered for premium men’s accessories — cufflinks, tie clips, collar stays, and lapel pins. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, 18,000 sqm, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this box features a leatherette-wrapped exterior with N52 magnetic flip lid and precision die-cut velvet cavities. Daily output reaches 1.7 million boxes on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA/E die-cutters.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Dual-Layer Presentation Box with Foam Tray — Corporate Gift & Award Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

This magnetic closure presentation box features a dual-layer design combining a top display compartment with a bottom pull-out drawer — engineered for corporate gifting and award presentations where the recipient discovers layered contents across a deliberate unboxing sequence. The top layer presents the primary gift item (watch, pen set, award medal) in a precision die-cut EVA foam tray, while the lower drawer reveals supporting materials (certificate, warranty card, accessory). N52 neodymium magnets embedded in the lid flap provide a satisfying 15N closure with soft-close feel. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing on Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA die-cutting, every box achieves furniture-grade assembly precision. With 23 years of magnetic closure box expertise, ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, and 220,000+ daily output across an 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai delivers corporate presentation packaging that reflects brand prestige.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Fountain Pen Gift Set Box — Satin Lined 2-Pen Tray with Ink Bottle Slot
item.description: Magnetic closure fountain pen gift set box with satin lined 2-pen tray and ink bottle slot — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. This elegant book-style magnetic closure box features a padded satin interior with precision die-cut cavities for two fountain pens and a standard ink bottle (30-50ml). The magnetic snap closure provides a satisfying premium feel while keeping the contents secure. Gold foil logo stamping on the cover and spine creates a luxury boutique presentation perfect for corporate gifting, pen collector editions, and retail display. Produced on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press and Bobst SP 102 BMA die-cutter across our 18,000 sqm factory with 1.7M daily output capacity.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Luxury Wine Bottle Gift Box with Satin Ribbon Pull
item.description: Magnetic Closure Luxury Wine Bottle Gift Box with satin ribbon pull tab by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). Designed to transform a standard 750ml wine or spirits bottle into a premium gift presentation, this rigid box features a die-cut interior cavity that cradles the bottle securely, a satin ribbon pull for effortless lifting, and N52 neodymium magnets for a satisfying snap-shut closure. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility. Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Multi-Layer Tea Chest Gift Box with Gold Foil Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Multi-Layer Tea Chest with Gold Foil Embossing reimagines the traditional tea cabinet as a precision-engineered luxury gift box. Designed for premium tea brands, boutique tea houses, and corporate gifting programs, this 3-tier magnetic closure chest delivers an unboxing experience that communicates heritage, craftsmanship, and exclusivity before the first tea leaf is seen.

Each of the three satin-lined drawers slides on precision die-cut tracks (±0.2mm tolerance) engineered on our Bobst Visioncut 106 LER flatbed die-cutter. The drawers are independently secured by concealed N52-grade neodymium magnets — the highest commercially available grade — providing a consistent 800g+ holding force tested on every unit. The book-style lid opens to reveal a gold foil embossed brand plate, while brass-finish drawer pulls (customizable to antique bronze, chrome, rose gold, or matte black) add vintage character.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Premium Whiskey Gift Box — Wood-Grain Embossed — Foam Bottle Insert — Bincai Rigid Packaging
item.description: The magnetic closure premium whiskey gift box combines rigid box construction with a sophisticated wood-grain embossed exterior and precision die-cut EVA foam insert to create a luxury unboxing experience for spirit brands. Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. manufactures this product in our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex in Foshan, China, utilizing KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses alongside BHS 2.5m Corrugator and Bobst SP 102 BMA die-cutting equipment. With ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications and a daily output of 1.7 million boxes, Bincai delivers distillery-grade packaging at global scale.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Round Hat Box with Satin Ribbon Pull Custom CMYK Print
item.description: Magnetic closure round cylindrical hat box with satin ribbon pull and custom CMYK printing, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The round cylindrical design with N52 neodymium magnetic closure provides a premium unboxing experience — the lid snaps securely shut and opens smoothly with the satin ribbon pull. Ideal for luxury fashion accessories, premium gift sets, and boutique retail packaging. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Watch Collector Box with 12-Slot Suede Tray & Tempered Glass Lid
item.description:
Product Overview

The Magnetic Closure Watch Collector Box with 12-Slot Suede Tray combines gallery-quality display with secure, dust-protected storage for serious watch collections. The full-width tempered glass lid (5mm, polished edges) provides a crystal-clear view of all 12 timepieces while protecting against dust, humidity, and accidental contact. Each of the 12 removable suedette pillows (70×40×35mm) is individually wrapped and sized to accommodate watches from slim dress pieces (32mm case) to oversized dive watches (52mm case). Four N52 neodymium magnets create a satisfying, secure closure with zero lid sag, while the stainless steel hinges include a 90° stop mechanism that prevents over-opening. Whether displayed on a dresser, used as retail point-of-sale presentation, or gifted as a corporate milestone award, this collector box communicates the value of the watches inside.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Wood-Grain Premium Wine & Spirit Box
item.description: Magnetic closure wood-grain premium wine and spirit box — the definitive packaging solution for luxury beverage brands, from Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years). Engineered with a 3mm heavy-duty rigid greyboard structure wrapped in realistic wood-grain textured paper, this magnetic closure box delivers the gravitas of a wooden humidor at a fraction of the cost. Six wood-grain finishes are available: American white oak, French walnut, Honduran mahogany, cherry wood, African ebony, and Scandinavian pine. Each features high-definition wood-grain texturing with authentic knot and grain reproduction, finished with a matte protective laminate. The N52 neodymium magnetic closure (4 magnets) provides a premium snap-close experience while the die-cut bottle cradle insert with satin ribbon lift securely holds standard 750ml bottles, magnum 1.5L formats, and custom spirits bottle shapes. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV offset presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA foil stamping for brand logos and vintage markings. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility delivers 220,000+ rigid boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications.

item.title: Matte Black Magnetic Flip-Lid Box with Hot Foil Logo for Premium Electronics
item.description: Matte black magnetic flip-lid rigid box with custom hot foil logo — engineered by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. for premium consumer electronics packaging that demands both protection and presentation. The deep matte black surface, achieved through our soft-touch or matte lamination process, provides a fingerprint-resistant, scratch-concealing finish that stays pristine through retail handling. The hot foil stamped logo — in gold, silver, copper, rose gold, or holographic — creates a striking contrast against the matte black background, elevating brand perception. Inside, a precision die-cut EVA foam tray (CNC-routered to ±0.3mm) cradles the device securely, while the microfiber or suede-effect lining prevents scratches and conveys luxury. N52 neodymium magnets deliver a satisfying, authoritative closure with ≥8N retention force — tested to 10,000+ open/close cycles. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory. 23 years of manufacturing excellence, 1.7M boxes daily. See why 200+ global brands choose Bincai as their packaging partner.

item.title: Premium Smartphone Magnetic Flip Unboxing Retail Packaging Box
item.description: Premium smartphone magnetic flip unboxing box by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). Designed for the premium unboxing experience that modern smartphone and consumer electronics brands demand, this magnetic flip-lid box combines rigid greyboard construction with soft-touch matte lamination, precision debossed branding, and a microfiber-lined interior. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Premium Wine Bottle Magnetic Closure Gift Box Velvet Interior Ribbon Pull
item.description: Premium wine bottle magnetic closure gift box with plush velvet interior and elegant satin ribbon pull tab by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003). Designed for single or dual wine bottles, champagne, premium spirits, and craft beverages. The magnetic snap-shut closure creates a premium unboxing experience while the velvet-lined interior cradles and protects the bottle with die-cut neck and base form-fitting cavities. Gold foil logo stamping and UV spot varnish accents on Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press. Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Slim Magnetic Closure Box for Premium Stationery and Notebook Gift Sets
item.description: Slim-profile magnetic closure rigid box designed for premium stationery, notebooks, planners, and writing instrument gift sets — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The slim 25-35mm profile is engineered specifically for A5 notebooks, hardcover journals, planner systems, and luxury pen sets — packaging categories where standard-depth magnetic boxes feel oversized and wasteful. Concealed neodymium magnets create a satisfying snap closure, while the satin ribbon lift tab adds an elegant retrieval gesture. A debossed logo on the lid provides subtle, premium brand presence. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across 18,000 sqm factory in Foshan. Daily output: 1.7 million boxes plus 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Book-Style Magnetic Closure Corporate Presentation Kit — Satin Ribbon, Custom Foam Insert, Gold Foil
item.description: The Book-Style Magnetic Closure Corporate Presentation Kit delivers the gravitas your brand deserves. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this box opens like a fine hardcover book — revealing a custom die-cut foam tray that presents your corporate materials with precision. N52-grade neodymium magnets embedded in the 2.5mm greyboard lid and base provide a satisfying snap-close action engineered for 10,000+ cycles. A hand-tied satin ribbon pull tab and gold foil logo stamping complete the executive-grade presentation. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certification, each kit is built for the C-suite.

item.title: Custom Magnetic Closure Sunglasses Gift Box — Velvet Liner with Flocked Insert
item.description: Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. produces this custom magnetic closure sunglasses gift box for luxury eyewear brands demanding premium unboxing experiences. The box combines N52-grade neodymium magnets for a satisfying snap closure with a plush velvet interior liner and flocked PET insert tray — the standard for luxury eyewear brands demanding premium shelf presentation. Manufactured in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses, each box passes Seven-Stage QC inspection with ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody traceability. Daily output capacity of 1.7 million boxes supports volume orders from 500 to 500,000 units with consistent 10-14 day lead times.

item.title: Flip-Top Magnetic Closure Box with Die-Cut EVA Foam Insert Electronics Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Guangdong Bincai’s flip-top magnetic closure box with precision die-cut EVA foam insert is engineered for premium electronics packaging. The flip-top design — a modern alternative to hinged lids — opens forward at a precisely etched 30° angle stop, revealing the product nestled in CNC-milled EVA foam. The hidden N52 neodymium magnets provide a crisp snap-close, while the precision-cut foam cavities (±0.2mm tolerance) cradle the product securely during shipping and create a premium retail unboxing experience. 23 years of manufacturing, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC certified.

item.title: Leatherette Magnetic Flap Wine Bottle Gift Box for Premium Spirits
item.description: Leatherette-wrapped magnetic flap rigid wine bottle gift box with die-cut bottle cavity and gold foil branding by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The premium PU leatherette exterior with gold foil branding creates a luxury presentation that elevates the perceived value of any wine, champagne, or spirits brand. The magnetic flap closure provides a satisfying snap-shut action while the die-cut cavity holds bottles securely during transport. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) (2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Luxury Magnetic Closure Gift Box with Soft-Touch Matte Lamination and Gold Foil Logo
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Luxury Magnetic Closure Gift Box combines velvety soft-touch matte lamination with precision hot foil stamping to create an unforgettable unboxing experience. Each box features N52 grade neodymium magnetic snap closure for effortless, whisper-quiet lid operation, a fully lined velvet or satin interior, and ±0.1mm gold foil registration via our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press. With 23 years of packaging manufacturing expertise, Bincai operates from a dual 18,000 sqm facility in Foshan, Guangdong, producing over 1.7 million boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Art Print Portfolio Box Acid-Free Lining A3 Size
item.description: Magnetic closure art print portfolio box with acid-free archival lining — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Designed for artists, galleries, museums, and limited-edition print publishers, this rigid portfolio box features acid-free lining that protects prints, photographs, and fine art papers from yellowing and degradation. The magnetic closure provides secure storage while the flat-lay lid design allows the box to double as a presentation platform. KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses deliver precision printing across 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory). Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Book-Style Corporate Presentation Kit — Gold Foil Debossing, Foam Insert
item.description: The Magnetic Closure Book-Style Corporate Presentation Kit transforms routine business materials into a memorable brand experience. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years experience) at our 18,000 sqm dual-factory facility in Foshan, this kit is designed to mirror the tactile experience of opening a fine hardcover book — the magnetic closure releases with a satisfying soft snap, the heavy board cover swings open on a fabric-wrapped hinge, and the interior reveals a precisely die-cut foam tray showcasing your brand assets. Produced on our KBA Rapida 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with 220,000+ rigid boxes daily output, we deliver presentation kits that elevate brand perception from the first touch.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Book-Style Premium Tea Collector's Box with Velvet Tray
item.description:
Product Overview

This book-style magnetic closure tea collector’s box transforms tea packaging into an experience worthy of the world’s finest teas. The hinged rigid construction opens like a premium hardcover book, revealing a 6-compartment velvet-lined tray that holds individual tea bags, loose tea sachets, or mini pu-erh tea cakes. The spine can be foil-stamped with the tea collection name, making it stunning on a shelf or tea counter display. The N35 neodymium magnetic closure provides a satisfying snap when closing, ensuring tea freshness is preserved between tastings. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing — manufacturing premium packaging since 2003 — each box combines 2.5mm greyboard structural integrity with soft-touch lamination for a velvety matte exterior. Our 18,000 sqm facility with daily output of 1.7 million boxes guarantees consistent quality at any order volume. Ideal for premium tea brands, tea subscription services, hotel and resort welcome amenities, corporate tea gifts, and luxury tea retailers.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Custom Jigsaw Puzzle Gift Box — Game & Toy Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Premium magnetic closure puzzle gift box for jigsaw puzzles, board games, and collectible toys — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com. This book-style magnetic flap box features full-color CMYK exterior printing with game board artwork or custom brand graphics, a precision die-cut EVA foam insert with puzzle piece cavities, and a satin ribbon pull for elegant opening. The rigid greyboard construction (1200–1600gsm, custom-specified per box size and weight requirements) protects puzzle pieces during retail display, storage, and e-commerce shipping while the N35–N52 neodymium magnetic closure keeps contents secure. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, completed 2025). Daily output of 1.7 million color-printed boxes + 220,000+ rigid gift boxes. 23 years of Guangdong manufacturing excellence since 2003, serving 200+ global brands across 60+ countries.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Double-Door Gift Box with Satin Ribbon Tie — Luxury Fragrance & Perfume Gift Set Packaging
item.description: Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) delivers the ultimate luxury unboxing experience with this magnetic closure double-door gift box — engineered specifically for premium fragrance and perfume gift sets. The double-door design creates a dramatic reveal: the recipient unties the satin ribbon, the two doors swing open on hidden magnetic closures, and the fragrance bottles are presented in a custom-fit velvet or foam tray — an experience that transforms packaging into a brand statement.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Luxury Candle Gift Box with Ribbon Pull and Foam Insert
item.description: The Magnetic Closure Luxury Candle Gift Box is a premium rigid packaging solution engineered specifically for luxury candle brands. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. at their 18,000 sqm dual-factory facility in Foshan, this box combines elegant presentation with robust product protection. The hidden N52 neodymium magnets deliver a satisfying snap closure while the satin ribbon pull tab provides effortless opening — a detail that discerning candle brands value for high-end retail environments.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Luxury Tie & Cufflink Gift Set Box with Satin-Lined Compartments and Gold Foil
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Magnetic Closure Luxury Tie & Cufflink Gift Set Box offers a complete presentation solution for the discerning menswear market. A full-length satin-lined tie channel sits alongside a die-cut cufflink tray — both revealed simultaneously as the magnetic flip lid opens with a satisfying premium resistance. Gold foil branding on the exterior and interior lid reinforces brand identity at every touchpoint. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm integrated facility in Foshan using KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV foil presses. 23 years of paper box mastery, ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified, with 1.7 million boxes shipped daily to luxury brands across 50+ countries.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Luxury Watch Display Box — LED-Illuminated with Vegan Leather Wrap & Suede Pillow
item.description: The magnetic closure luxury watch display box elevates timepiece presentation with museum-quality lighting and refined materials. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year Foshan paper box specialist with 18,000 sqm across two production facilities — this box wraps 2mm rigid greyboard in premium vegan leather (PU) with a soft-touch matte finish, creating a tactile experience worthy of haute horlogerie. The hidden magnetic closure eliminates visible hardware for a seamless, minimalist exterior, while the LED-illuminated interior — activated automatically upon opening — spotlights the timepiece like a gallery showcase.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Pen Display Gift Box — Individual Slots + Satin Lining for Corporate & Executive Gifts
item.description: Magnetic closure pen display gift box with individual pen slots and premium satin lining for corporate gifts and executive stationery — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. This elegant pen presentation box features a magnetic flap closure that opens to reveal one or two pens secured in satin-lined grooves or elastic straps. The exterior can be finished in matte art paper, leatherette, or textured linen with gold foil logo debossing for a distinguished corporate identity. An optional card slot inside the lid holds a certificate of authenticity or personal message. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm factory.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Photo Album Presentation Box — Linen Wrap Archival Quality
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s magnetic closure photo album presentation box combines archival-grade protection with the tactile luxury of linen bookcloth. The 2mm rigid greyboard core is fully wrapped in textured Belgian-style linen over a hidden neodymium magnetic closure — invisible from the outside, satisfyingly firm to open. Inside, acid-free pH-neutral archival paper lines every surface, with a custom-fit album cradle that prevents shifting during transport. Designed for wedding photographers, fine art studios, corporate yearbook publishers, and luxury brands that treat their printed work as an heirloom. Manufactured on Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with precision die-cutting in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Premium Candle Packaging Box — Soft-Touch & Gold Foil
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s magnetic closure candle packaging box is designed for premium candle brands that understand packaging is half the product experience — before the customer smells the fragrance, they feel the box. The 2.0mm greyboard core delivers substantial weight and rigidity. A soft-touch matte wrap with gold foil branding creates shelf presence that competes with Diptyque, Jo Malone, and Byredo. Inside, a flocked PET tray cradles the candle vessel securely with ±0.5mm precision. Dual N35 neodymium magnets provide a satisfying, silent close. Manufactured in our Foshan smart factory (18,000 sqm) on Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset, KBA 1050 4-color presses, and Bobst BMA foil stampers. 80+ skilled workers, 23 years of packaging expertise.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Premium Watch Display Box with Genuine Leatherette Wrap and Suede Interior
item.description: Magnetic closure premium watch display box with genuine leatherette wrap and suede interior — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). The sleek magnetic flap closure opens to reveal a soft suede-lined interior with a removable watch cushion that elegantly displays any timepiece. PU leatherette wrapping in matte, textured, or carbon-fiber finishes creates a luxury feel that rivals boxes from major watch brands. KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses deliver premium finishing across 18,000 sqm factory. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Premium Whiskey Decanter Gift Set Box with Satin Interior and Custom Foam
item.description: Magnetic closure premium whiskey decanter gift set box with satin-lined interior and custom die-cut foam insert — crafted for luxury spirits brands, limited-edition releases, and high-end corporate gifting. The magnetic closure provides a satisfying, secure close while maintaining a clean, uninterrupted exterior surface for premium branding. Inside, a precision CNC-cut EVA foam insert cradles the decanter and accompanying glasses, while the satin-lined interior creates a gallery-like presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses produce gallery-quality printing across an 18,000 sqm dual-factory campus. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Shoe Box — Die-Cut Viewing Window + Satin Ribbon Pull
item.description: Magnetic closure shoe box with die-cut viewing window and satin ribbon pull — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. Designed for premium footwear brands, sneaker retailers, and direct-to-consumer shoe companies seeking an elevated unboxing experience. The die-cut PET window allows customers to view the shoes without opening the box, while the satin ribbon pull provides an elegant opening mechanism. The magnetic closure lid snaps shut securely and the rigid board construction protects footwear during retail display and shipping. Produced across our 18,000 sqm factory with 1.7M daily output capacity.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Single Watch Presentation Box — Vegan Leather Wrap with Velvet Insert
item.description: Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. presents the single-watch magnetic closure presentation box — a premium packaging solution for luxury timepiece brands, corporate recognition gifts, and high-end retail display. Manufactured in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility with 23 years of rigid box expertise, this box combines a vegan leather-wrapped rigid board exterior with N52 neodymium magnetic closure and plush flocked velvet interior. Every detail — from ±0.15mm foil registration to 10,000-cycle hinge durability — reflects Bincai’s commitment to precision craftsmanship under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Watch Roll Travel Case — 3-Watch Suede Interior
item.description:
Product Overview

Elegant watch roll travel case combining the protective structure of a rigid box with the portability of a roll-up design. The exterior is wrapped in pebbled PU leather with soft-touch lamination, while the interior features three removable suede watch cushions on snap-button mounts — allowing watches of different sizes to be securely held during travel. A wide magnetic flap with hidden N52 neodymium magnets provides secure closure without zippers or buckles that could scratch timepieces. The roll-up-and-tie design compresses to a compact cylinder for luggage packing. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) — 23 years crafting premium packaging for luxury goods.

item.title: Clamshell Magnetic Closure Presentation Box with Custom Foam Insert — Electronics Packaging
item.description: The clamshell magnetic closure presentation box with custom foam insert is the premium packaging standard for consumer electronics, delivering the unboxing experience that defines luxury tech brands. The clamshell design opens like a book to reveal the product nestled in a precision die-cut foam cradle, while concealed N52 neodymium magnets provide a satisfying, secure closure with an audible snap. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years) at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, with ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications.

item.title: Custom Magnetic Closure Fountain Pen Display Box with Faux Leather Wrap
item.description:
Product Overview

Our custom magnetic closure fountain pen display box wraps premium greyboard in elegant faux leather, creating a sophisticated presentation befitting luxury writing instruments. The book-style lid opens on a hidden magnetic closure to reveal a plush suede-lined interior with a precision die-cut pen tray — cradling each fountain pen, rollerball, or ballpoint in its own sculpted recess. The faux leather exterior is available in classic black, rich cognac brown, deep navy, or custom colors with optional debossing and hot foil stamping for brand logos. Manufactured in our 10,000 sqm ISO 9001-certified facility with Heidelberg 7+1 UV printing for any interior branding, each box reflects Bincai’s 23 years of premium packaging expertise.

item.title: Luxury Watch Winder Display Box — Magnetic Closure with Japanese Mabuchi Motor & Suede Interior
item.description:
Product Overview

Premium single-watch winder display box combining luxury presentation with precision watch care. The magnetic flip lid opens to reveal an acrylic viewing window and a suede-effect watch cushion mounted on a whisper-quiet Japanese Mabuchi motor. Four programmable rotation modes (650/900/1200/1800 TPD) accommodate all automatic watch movements. The carbon-fiber-textured exterior with soft-touch matte lamination and hidden neodymium magnetic closure creates a sophisticated unboxing experience worthy of luxury timepieces. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility with 1.7M daily box output capacity.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Acrylic-Lid Fountain Pen Display Gift Box — Velvet Tray, Custom Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

A luxury fountain pen demands packaging that does more than protect — it must showcase. The Magnetic Closure Acrylic-Lid Pen Display Gift Box achieves both with a transparent 2mm cast acrylic lid that transforms the box into an instant display case. When the customer opens the outer shipping carton, the pen is already visible, presented on a velvet-flocked tray in a museum-quality arrangement. No unwrapping, no unboxing puzzle — just an immediate emotional connection between the recipient and the writing instrument.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Book-Style Gift Box for Corporate Welcome Kits
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Magnetic Closure Book-Style Gift Box elevates corporate gifting from ordinary to exceptional. Opening like a hardcover book, this 2.5mm rigid greyboard box features a satisfying magnetic closure that snaps shut with precision — the tactile experience that luxury brands demand. Inside, a recessed tray with ribbon pull-tab organizes welcome kit contents: branded notebook, pen, company swag, welcome letter, and onboarding materials. Exterior wrapped in premium art paper with gold foil logo stamping on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV press. With 23 years of rigid box manufacturing expertise and 220,000+ gift boxes daily from our Foshan facility, Bincai is the partner behind some of the world’s most recognized corporate welcome experiences.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Cigar Humidor Box with Spanish Cedar Lining and Custom Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

Our magnetic closure cigar humidor box combines 23 years of precision rigid-box manufacturing with authentic Spanish cedar interior lining — the gold standard for cigar storage. The 3mm rigid greyboard construction with full-perimeter neodymium magnetic seal strip maintains a stable 65–72 % RH internal environment, while the 5mm Spanish cedar (Cedrela odorata) veneer lining naturally regulates humidity, repels tobacco beetles, and imparts the classic cedar aroma that enhances cigar flavor over time. A precision hygrometer slot and humidification element compartment complete the functional design. Custom deep-embossed branding on the lid surface — printed on a KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV line, then foil-stamped on a Bobst hot-foil press at ±0.15 mm registration — adds unmistakable brand prestige to every box.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Corporate Presentation Kit Box with Custom Foam Insert for Brochures and Pen
item.description:
Product Description

Magnetic closure corporate presentation kit box with custom foam insert — designed and manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). This premium presentation case transforms a stack of documents into a memorable brand experience. The custom die-cut EVA or PU foam insert precisely holds A4 brochures, business cards, a premium pen, and a USB drive or product sample — every item has its designated place. Hidden N52 neodymium magnets provide a satisfying snap closure that conveys quality the moment the recipient opens the box. The exterior features soft-touch matte lamination with gold or silver foil-stamped logo, delivering the weight and presence of a luxury product.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Cosmetic Skincare Set Box 5-Piece Foam Tray
item.description:
Product Overview

A premium magnetic-closure rigid box designed specifically for 5-piece cosmetic and skincare gift sets. The custom die-cut EVA foam tray cradles each product (serum bottles, cream jars, toner, etc.) with precision-fit cavities that prevent movement during shipping and create a striking unboxing reveal. Soft-touch matte lamination on the exterior delivers a velvety tactile experience, while gold foil hot-stamped branding on the lid communicates luxury. Manufactured at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with in-house die-cutting, lamination, and assembly.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Fragrance Gift Set Box — Custom Branded Perfume & Cologne Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Premium magnetic closure fragrance gift set box engineered for luxury perfume and cologne brands. The book-style magnetic flip lid with integrated satin ribbon pull creates a ceremonial unboxing experience that elevates brand perception. A precision die-cut foam tray securely holds 2–4 glass fragrance bottles, protecting them during shipping and retail display. Full CMYK offset printing with hot foil logo stamping and soft-touch matte lamination across the exterior. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan dual-factory complex. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Hexagonal Tea Chest Gift Box with 6 Compartment Foam Insert
item.description:
Product Overview

Hexagonal magnetic closure tea chest gift box with 6-compartment custom foam insert — designed for premium tea brands, corporate gift sets, and luxury confectionery samplers. The striking six-sided geometry creates exceptional shelf presence while the concealed neodymium magnet closure delivers a satisfying, premium unboxing experience. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan dual-factory complex. The rigid 2.0mm greyboard construction wrapped in 157gsm art paper provides a substantial, luxury feel. The custom die-cut foam insert secures six individual tea portions, truffles, or small luxury items in precision-fit cavities. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Luxury Perfume Gift Box with Die-Cut Satin Window and Ribbon Pull
item.description:
Product Overview

Perfume packaging carries a unique burden: it must protect a fragile glass bottle, communicate luxury, and survive the journey from factory floor to retail shelf to gift-wrap reveal — all while competing for attention in a market where 80% of purchasing decisions happen at the point of display. The Magnetic Closure Luxury Perfume Gift Box with Die-Cut Satin Window solves all three challenges in one elegant design.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Portfolio Presentation Box with Document Sleeve and Pen Loop
item.description: Executive-grade portfolio-style magnetic closure presentation box — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. Inspired by premium document folios, this box features a book-style magnetic flap that opens to reveal a thoughtfully organized interior: a clear PET document sleeve on the inner lid for brochures, certificates, or welcome letters; an elastic pen loop for branded writing instruments; and a custom die-cut foam tray for the primary gift item. The invisible neodymium magnetic closure provides a satisfying, secure snap. Ideal for corporate award ceremonies, luxury brand press kits, VIP client gifts, and executive onboarding packages. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across 18,000 sqm factory.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Premium Candle Gift Box 3-Wick Foam Insert
item.description:
Product Overview

A magnetic-closure rigid gift box purpose-built for premium 3-wick candles. The deep die-cut EVA foam insert securely cradles a candle jar up to 120mm diameter × 100mm height, preventing glass-on-glass contact during transit. Spot UV coating on the exterior lid creates a luxurious contrast between matte and gloss surfaces, while the embossed logo adds dimensional branding. A satin ribbon pull tab makes opening effortless and elegant. Manufactured at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with precision die-cutting and hot-foil finishing on Heidelberg 7+1 UV.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Premium Headphone Gift Box with Custom Foam Cradle — Audio Brand Packaging
item.description:
Premium magnetic closure gift box engineered for high-end headphones and audio accessories, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. Rigid 2.5mm greyboard with soft-touch matte lamination, custom die-cut EVA or PU foam cradle that cradles headphones in a sculpted presentation. Magnetic snap closure opens flat for a premium retail unboxing experience.

Features

  • Rigid 2.5mm greyboard construction — heavier caliper for substantial premium feel
  • Soft-touch matte lamination on 157gsm art paper wrap — fingerprint-resistant velvet-like surface
  • Custom die-cut EVA or PU foam cradle — precisely sculpted to your headphone model
  • Strong magnetic snap closure — dual neodymium magnets for secure closing
  • Custom logo embossing, debossing, or hot foil stamping on lid
  • Available in single-tier (headphones only) or double-tier (headphones + accessories compartment)
  • Interior cable management channel in foam — keeps audio cable and accessories organized
  • KBA 1050 4-color offset + Heidelberg 7+1 UV for brand graphics and spot coatings
  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management, FSC certified sustainable materials
  • 18,000 sqm dual factory, 1.7M boxes daily output, serving 200+ global brands

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Consumer Audio Over-ear, on-ear, and in-ear monitor (IEM) headphone retail packaging Custom foam cradle provides zero-movement protection during shipping + showroom-grade presentation
Pro Audio Studio monitor headphones, DJ headphones, broadcast headsets Heavy-duty 2.5mm board with reinforced corners for touring and trade show transport
Gaming Gaming headset gift packaging with accessory compartments Double-tier option stores headset + detachable mic + USB dongle in organized foam layout
Luxury Tech Gifts Premium headphone gift sets for corporate gifting and special editions Soft-touch lamination + embossed logo delivers luxury unboxing experience
E-Commerce Audio Brands Direct-to-consumer headphone fulfillment packaging Rigid construction + foam cradle passes ISTA 1A drop testing for courier shipping
Made-in-China B2B Wholesale OEM headphone packaging for audio brands worldwide MOQ 500, full custom foam design, competitive factory-direct pricing

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Foam Type EVA foam (standard — firm, durable), PU foam (softer, luxury feel), or PE foam (lightweight, budget-friendly)
Foam Color Black, charcoal, white, navy, or custom — matched to your brand palette
Foam Surface Smooth, textured, or fabric-laminated (velvet, suede, or microfiber)
Tier Configuration Single-tier (headphones only) or double-tier (headphones + cable/USB dongle/accessories compartment)
Cable Management Integrated foam channel for audio cable routing, or elastic strap retention system
Exterior Material 157gsm art paper with matte/gloss lamination, soft-touch coating, linen-textured paper, or PU leather wrap
Exterior Color Any Pantone — black, charcoal, navy, white, or custom brand color
Logo Application Hot foil stamping, blind embossing, debossing, UV spot, full-color offset, or screen printing
Magnetic Closure Dual neodymium magnets (standard), or single large-format magnetic strip for full-width closure
Additional Features Ribbon pull tab, magnetic certificate/document pocket, custom-printed sleeve/band, QR code printing
Custom Sizes 220×200×80mm (on-ear) to 300×250×120mm (over-ear) — custom die tooling available
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom foam tooling or specialty exterior materials)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Greyboard 1600gsm rigid greyboard — 2.5mm caliper, density 0.65-0.75 g/cm³
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for hinge and magnet pockets
Wrap Application Automatic wrapping machine — 157gsm art paper with hot-melt adhesive, bubble-free finish
Soft-Touch Lamination Aqueous soft-touch coating — 2-3μm thickness, velvet-like tactile, fingerprint-resistant
Foam Cradle CNC-machined EVA/PU foam — 2D CAD → 3D CAM toolpath, ±0.5mm cavity tolerance
Foam-to-Board Bonding Permanent pressure-sensitive adhesive on foam backer — full-surface coverage, peel ≥8N/25mm
Magnet Insertion Neodymium disc magnets Ø10mm×3mm — press-fit into die-cut greyboard cavities, pull force ≥6N each
Foil Stamping Heidelberg hot foil press — KURZ foil, 120-140°C, on art paper or soft-touch surface
Hinge Construction Scored greyboard + wrap — reinforced with cloth tape at hinge for 10,000+ cycles
Edge Finishing Turned-edge construction — wrap folded over board, no raw edges exposed
ISO 9001 Full batch documentation — board lot, foam batch, lamination lot, magnet supplier, QC per batch

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board caliper Digital micrometer — 5 points per sheet 2.5mm ±0.2mm
Wrap adhesion Cross-hatch tape test No delamination, ≤5% removal
Soft-touch coating uniformity Visual + glossmeter at 60° Gloss ≤5 GU, no streaks or blotches
Foam cavity fit Test insert with customer headphone sample Snug fit, ≤1mm lateral movement, no compression of ear cushions
Foam adhesion to board Peel test at 180° ≥8N/25mm, no foam delamination
Magnet pull force Force gauge — perpendicular ≥6N per magnet (≥12N closure force)
Magnet alignment Test close — 100 cycles Consistent self-alignment, no scratching of wrap
Hinge durability Open/close cycle — 500 cycles No board cracking, no wrap delamination at hinge
Drop test ISTA 1A — 76cm free-fall with headphone payload No structural failure, foam cradle intact, headphones undamaged
Color consistency Spectrophotometer — D50 ΔE ≤2.0 versus approved swatch
Overall appearance Visual under D50 No scratches, glue marks, foam debris, or wrapping defects

FAQ

Q: How do you design the foam cradle to fit our specific headphone model accurately?

item.title: Magnetic Closure Presentation Folder Kit with Document Sleeve Pen Loop USB Slot
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Magnetic Closure Presentation Folder Kit transforms corporate materials into a branded experience. Built on a 2.0mm greyboard rigid base wrapped in premium art paper with gold foil-embossed logo, this A4-sized folder opens via a satisfying magnetic flap closure to reveal: a clear PET document sleeve for brochures, an elastic pen loop holding a custom-branded pen, a die-cut USB drive slot, and a business card pocket. Every component is precisely positioned within the rigid folder structure — no shifting during transport. Manufactured at our Foshan facility with 23 years of premium rigid box expertise. For a deeper look at the engineering behind our magnetic box construction — from concealed neodymium magnets to hinge durability testing — read our Magnetic Closure Box Engineering Guide.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Rigid Candle Gift Box with Satin Ribbon Custom Foil Stamping
item.description:
Present your artisan candles in packaging as refined as the product inside. Bincai’s magnetic closure rigid candle gift box combines structural integrity with luxury aesthetics, creating a memorable unboxing experience that elevates your brand and justifies premium pricing.

Key Features

  • Two-Piece Rigid Construction: 1.5–2.0mm greyboard wrapped in premium art paper with matte or gloss lamination for a sturdy, high-end feel.
  • Magnetic Flip Lid: Neodymium magnets embedded in the lid and base create a satisfying closure with tactile snap — no cheap glue tabs or friction fits.
  • Satin Ribbon Pull: Color-matched satin ribbon makes opening effortless and adds a boutique elegance touch.
  • Custom Die-Cut Foam Insert: Securely cradles candle jars (standard 8oz, 12oz, 16oz sizes) preventing movement during transit and keeping the label facing forward.
  • Custom Foil Stamping: Brand logo, scent name, or decorative pattern in gold, silver, rose gold, copper, or holographic foil on lid and/or sides.

Applications

Market Segment Use Case
Luxury Candle Brands Premium unboxing for $40+ candles — packaging that customers photograph and share
Wedding & Event Favors Personalized candle favors with couple’s names, wedding date, and foil-stamped monogram
Corporate Gifts Branded candle sets for client appreciation, holiday gifting, employee recognition
Hotel & Spa Amenities Boutique hotel candle packaging with property branding and scent story
Subscription Boxes Monthly candle subscription packaging that protects product and impresses subscribers
Holiday Gift Sets Christmas, Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day candle gift box collections

Customization Options

Option Details
Exterior Finish Matte lamination, gloss lamination, soft-touch velvet lamination, linen texture, or leatherette wrap
Printing CMYK offset (KBA 1050) + spot UV, foil stamping, embossing, debossing
Foil Colors Gold, silver, rose gold, copper, bronze, holographic, matte gold
Ribbon Color White, black, cream, gold, silver, or any Pantone match
Insert Type Die-cut foam cradle, velvet flocked platform, satin pillow, or cardboard partition
Box Dimensions Custom to fit any candle jar diameter and height
Add-Ons Magnetic closure with ribbon, ribbon only, double ribbon bow, window cutout

Bincai Manufacturing Excellence

Our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000 sqm main plant + 8,000 sqm smart factory) in Guangdong, China, combines decades of craftsmanship with modern automation:

item.title: Magnetic Closure Tri-Fold Wallet Box for Gift Card & Certificate Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Magnetic Closure Tri-Fold Wallet Box transforms a flat gift card, certificate, or voucher into a memorable gift moment. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — 23 years of precision paper box manufacturing across an 18,000 sqm ISO 9001 & FSC certified campus — this box uses precision-placed neodymium magnets embedded between the board layers to achieve a satisfying, silent magnetic snap that communicates quality before the recipient even sees the contents. For a deep technical dive into our magnetic box engineering, read our magnetic closure technology guide covering magnet grade selection, polarity verification, and closure force optimization.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Watch Box with Vegan Leather Wrap Luxury Timepiece Packaging
item.description: Magnetic closure watch box with vegan leather wrap for luxury timepiece packaging — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Designed for premium watch brands requiring an elevated unboxing experience. The exterior features a 0.8mm textured vegan leather wrap (PU-based, REACH-compliant) over 2.5mm rigid greyboard with precision French-fold corner wrapping. The hidden N42 neodymium magnetic flap delivers a satisfying tactile closure with ±1mm alignment tolerance. Inside, removable microsuede watch cushions accommodate dials 38–48mm, with a dedicated compartment for strap or bracelet storage. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press (15,000 sheets/hour) and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press (inter-deck UV curing, single-pass CMYK+spot+coating) with Bobst SP 102 BMA foil stamping. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility delivers 220,000+ rigid boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 quality management and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Magnetic Flip-Lid Rigid Box with Ribbon Pull and Gold Foil Logo for Corporate Gifting
item.description: Premium magnetic flip-lid rigid box with satin ribbon pull and hot gold foil logo — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The magnetic closure delivers a satisfying, weighty snap that signals luxury before the box is even opened. The satin ribbon pull tab provides effortless one-finger opening. Built on 1600-2000gsm greyboard wrapped in custom-printed art paper, with N52 neodymium magnets recessed into the lid and base for flush alignment. Hot foil stamping in gold, silver, rose gold, or holographic finishes creates an indelible brand impression. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 220,000+ rigid gift boxes.

item.title: Portfolio Magnetic Closure Presentation Kit for Corporate Brand Documents
item.description: Premium portfolio-style magnetic closure presentation kit — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. Designed in a horizontal or vertical folio format with a wraparound magnetic flap that opens to reveal a precision die-cut foam interior. Each cavity is custom-molded to cradle brochures, pens, USB drives, business cards, and product samples — creating a cohesive, premium unboxing experience for corporate brand presentations, investor kits, and luxury sales collateral. The magnetic closure delivers a satisfying, authoritative snap that signals quality before the kit is even opened. Produced on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color presses across 18,000 sqm factory.

item.title: Premium Book-Style Magnetic Rigid Box with Gold Foil — Hardcover Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s book-style magnetic rigid box replicates the tactile elegance of a fine hardcover book — complete with spine debossing, gold foil accents, and a satisfying magnetic closure that snaps shut like closing a treasured volume. The dual-panel magnetic flap opens flat to 180°, revealing a velvet-lined interior tray that transforms unboxing into a curated experience.

Every box is hand-assembled with precision book-binding techniques in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility by an artisan team with 5–10+ years of rigid box wrapping experience. The 2.0mm greyboard core provides substantial weight and rigidity (true book-board heft), while the 157gsm art paper wrap receives vibrant CMYK printing on our KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press (15,000 sheets/hr). The Heidelberg Speedmaster XL CD 102 7+1 UV press adds selective spot UV on title and logo elements for dimensional contrast. The spine — 15–30mm wide with custom debossed title and optional ribbon headband — is engineered for shelf display, making the box itself part of the product collection rather than disposable packaging.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Gift Box with Velvet Insert
item.description:
Product Overview

A premium rigid magnetic closure gift box with plush velvet flocked interior, designed for high-end jewelry, watches, and luxury accessories. The soft-touch exterior with hidden neodymium magnets creates a clean, elegant unboxing experience with no visible hardware. Manufactured in our 18,000m² ISO 9001 factory with Heidelberg 7+1 UV press, Bobst hot foil stamping, and CNC die-cut insert precision. Available in custom dimensions and finishes for brand-specific presentation requirements.

item.title: 2026 Christmas Gift Box with Magnetic Closure Holiday Packaging
item.description: 2026 Christmas gift box with magnetic closure and premium holiday packaging by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The magnetic closure provides a satisfying snap-shut experience that elevates the unboxing moment, while the rigid greyboard construction protects premium gifts, jewelry, electronics, cosmetics, and luxury confectionery. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, expanded 2025). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Custom Magnetic Closure Presentation Box with Foam Tray for Corporate Pen Set
item.description: Custom magnetic closure presentation box with precision die-cut foam tray for corporate pen sets and executive gifts — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). The magnetic flip-lid design opens like a book to reveal a custom die-cut foam tray holding pens, USB drives, cufflinks, or other executive accessories in individual cavities. The satisfying magnetic snap and premium materials communicate brand quality from the first touch. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) floor. Daily output 1.7 million boxes with 80+ skilled workers.

item.title: Custom Magnetic Closure Wine Bottle Gift Box
item.description:
Product Overview

This custom magnetic closure wine bottle gift box is engineered specifically for 750ml standard wine and spirits bottles. The precision-cut EVA foam insert cradles the bottle securely, while the N35-grade magnetic closure provides a premium unboxing experience. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing — manufacturing premium packaging since 2003 — each box uses 2.5mm greyboard for structural integrity and 200gsm art paper wrap for a refined finish. Our 18,000 sqm facility with daily output of 1.7 million boxes ensures consistent quality at any order volume. Ideal for wineries, spirits brands, corporate gifting, and premium retail. The two-piece construction with removable lid creates a dramatic presentation that transforms a bottle into a luxurious gift — the recipient lifts the lid to reveal the bottle nestled in a precision-cut foam cradle, immediately communicating quality before the label is even seen. Bincai’s wine box line supports both single-bottle and dual-bottle configurations, with custom foam profiling for any bottle shape from standard Bordeaux to oversized Champagne magnums.

item.title: Hexagonal Paper Gift Box with Magnetic Closure Custom
item.description:
Product Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing produces custom hexagonal paper gift boxes featuring premium magnetic closure systems that combine distinctive geometry with a secure, satisfying open-and-close experience. Each box is built on a rigid greyboard core wrapped in your choice of art paper, specialty paper, or fabric, with neodymium magnets discreetly embedded in the lid and base for invisible closure. Our hexagonal shape stands out on retail shelves and creates a memorable unboxing moment for jewelry, luxury goods, corporate gifts, and wedding favors.

item.title: Luxury Two-Piece Magnetic Gift Box with Ribbon Pull
item.description:
Product Overview

This luxury two-piece magnetic closure gift box combines premium materials with elegant functionality. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing — with 23 years of experience since 2003 — the rigid structure uses 2.0mm greyboard wrapped in 157gsm art paper for a smooth, durable finish. A satin ribbon pull under the lid ensures effortless opening, while the N35-grade neodymium magnets deliver a satisfying snap closure. Inside, soft velvet lining protects delicate items like jewelry, watches, or premium cosmetics. With a daily output capacity of 1.7 million color boxes and 220,000+ gift boxes from our 18,000 sqm integrated factory, Bincai delivers at scale without compromising quality. The two-piece construction — separate lid and base — is the gold standard for luxury unboxing, offering a dramatic reveal that elevates brand perception. Each box undergoes individual QC inspection for magnet alignment, ribbon tension, and velvet adhesion before leaving our Shunde facility.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Book-Style Box with Satin Ribbon and Velvet Insert
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Magnetic Closure Book-Style Box combines the elegance of a hardcover book with the security of embedded N42 neodymium magnets and the soft luxury of a satin ribbon tie. The spine-hinged construction opens like a treasured volume, revealing a custom velvet-flocked insert tray that cradles products in plush refinement. Designed for premium corporate gifts, executive stationery sets, luxury accessory presentation, and commemorative packaging, each box is built on 2.0-3.0mm rigid greyboard wrapped in 157gsm art paper with gold or silver foil stamping on both the cover and spine. Produced at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility running KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, Bincai delivers over 220,000+ gift boxes daily with ISO 9001 and FSC certifications.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Box with Clear Sleeve Window Premium Gift Packaging
item.description: Premium magnetic closure rigid box with a transparent PET sleeve window — crafted by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The clear sleeve window allows the product to be fully showcased without removal, creating a double-layer unboxing experience: the sleeve slides off to reveal the rigid box underneath, then the magnetic flap opens with a satisfying snap. The PET window is precision die-cut and edge-polished for distortion-free product visibility. The sleeve adds an extra layer of protection during transit while doubling as a branding canvas — print your logo, pattern, or messaging on the sleeve, the box lid, or both for layered brand storytelling. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset presses across our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory). Daily output capacity of 1.7 million boxes (post-2025 expansion). ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Box with Die-Cut Insert Electronics Accessories
item.description:
Product Overview

The Magnetic Closure Box with Die-Cut Insert for electronics accessories by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. delivers premium protection and unboxing experience for high-value electronic products. Founded in 2003 and featured in China Print & Packaging News as a leading rigid-box manufacturer, Bincai operates an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC-certified facility with a daily output capacity of 1.7 million color boxes plus 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Candle Box with Window Display Custom Size Scented
item.description: Premium custom magnetic closure candle box with window display by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified packaging enterprise (founded 2003). Our magnetic closure candle boxes combine rigid 2.0mm greyboard construction with a precision die-cut clear PET or anti-fog PVC window, giving customers a direct, unobstructed view of your scented candles while the N52 neodymium magnetic closure delivers a satisfying premium unboxing experience — rated for 5,000+ open/close cycles without strength degradation. The window-to-board bonding uses ultrasonic or solvent-free adhesive with 72-hour peel testing to ensure zero delamination through temperature cycling and humidity exposure. Available with soft-touch matte lamination, hot foil stamping (gold, silver, rose gold, copper, holographic), blind embossing, and custom die-cut EVA foam inserts for multi-candle gift sets. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with Bobst flatbed die-cutting across 18,000 sqm of factory space (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, expanded 2025). Daily output of 1.7 million color boxes plus 220,000+ rigid gift boxes. MOQ 500 with free pre-production samples in 5–7 working days.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Cube-Shaped Gift Box with 360° Design Print — Premium Brand Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Magnetic Closure Cube Gift Box is a statement piece — a perfectly proportioned six-panel wrap-around canvas where every face (front, back, top, bottom, left, right) is printed in full-color CMYK as a continuous seamless wrap. This 360° design freedom is unmatched by conventional rigid boxes (which typically leave sides blank or printed separately), enabling brands to create immersive packaging that tells a story from every angle — from a lush botanical pattern wrapping all six faces of a luxury candle box to a continuous cityscape panorama encircling a premium tech accessory gift set. The magnetic lid (NdFeB N35 magnets in all four corners) snaps closed with a satisfying, premium “thunk” that becomes part of the unboxing ritual. At the core is a 1600gsm greyboard structure built on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA Rapida 105 press lines, produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified, with 23 years of premium packaging mastery delivering 220,000+ boxes daily.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Luxury Candle Gift Box with Satin Interior & Custom Foam Tray
item.description:
Premium magnetic closure gift box with satin-lined interior and custom foam tray — purpose-built for luxury candle gift sets. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm integrated factory with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Luxury Candle Brands Single or multi-candle gift sets Custom-cut foam tray secures each candle — no rattling or wax damage during transit
Home Fragrance Diffuser, candle, and room spray sets Multi-compartment foam tray organizes all components
Hotel & Hospitality VIP guest amenity candle boxes Satin interior elevates perceived value for 5-star properties
Corporate Gifting Branded candle gift for clients/employees Full-wrap CMYK printing + gold foil logo on lid
Wedding Favors Personalized candle gift boxes Custom ribbon color, monogram foil stamping, batch numbering
Seasonal Collections Holiday, Mother’s Day, Valentine’s limited editions Quick-change foam tray tooling for seasonal SKU variations
Subscription Boxes Premium candle-of-the-month club Magnetic closure supports repeated opening; foam tray reusable as candle storage

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Box Structure Single-door magnetic, book-style, magnetic flip-top, or drawer-slide magnetic
Greyboard Core 1000gsm, 1200gsm, 1600gsm — 1200gsm standard for candle weight
Wrap Material 157gsm art paper, 128gsm coated, textured linen, leatherette, or velvet paper
Printing CMYK offset (KBA 1050), Pantone spot, full bleed
Hot Stamping Gold, silver, rose gold, holographic, matte black foil — Heidelberg cylinder
Embossing Blind emboss, foil-over-emboss, multi-level sculpted emboss
Magnet Strength N35 (standard), N48 (stronger hold), or N52 (maximum hold) — 2, 4, or 6-magnet configuration
Satin Interior Black, white, ivory, champagne, navy, burgundy, or custom-dyed satin
Foam Tray EVA, PE, or PU foam — density 30-60kg/m³ — in black, white, or grey
Foam Cutouts Custom CNC-routed cavities for any candle shape: jar, pillar, votive, tealight, or irregular artisanal
Additional Features Ribbon pull tab, satin ribbon closure, card slot for gift message, integrated matchbox compartment
Custom Sizes 120×120×80mm to 400×250×150mm — custom tooling available
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom foam tooling or custom satin color)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Offset Press KBA 1050 4-color — high-registration CMYK with smooth gradient reproduction
UV Press Heidelberg 7+1 UV — specialty coatings for luxury candle market sheen
Magnet Insertion Automated magnet placement machine — N48 discs (10-15mm diameter) embedded into greyboard
Magnet Poles Polarity verification at insertion station — prevents reversed-pole rejects
Box Assembly Semi-automated hand-wrap line — precise corner mitering and edge folding
Satin Lining Die-cut satin sheets applied with water-based PVA — wrinkle-free tensioning jig
Foam Tray CNC 3-axis CNC router — ±0.5mm cavity precision for snug candle fit
Hot Stamping Heidelberg cylinder with foil-registration sensors — consistent impression at 80-120°C
Embossing Copper die + hydraulic press — relief depth 0.3mm–1.5mm
Adhesives Water-based PVA (no VOC), hot-melt for foam-to-board bonding
ISO 9001 Documented process at each station — receiving through pack-out final audit

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board grammage Digital scale ±1gsm Within spec tolerance
Moisture content Pin-type moisture meter ≤8%
Magnet strength Gauss meter at 5mm gap ≥1200 Gauss (N48, 15mm)
Magnet polarity Polarity checker — 100% in-line All magnets aligned N-S correctly
Lid closure alignment Visual jig — closed position ±0.5mm lateral, full magnetic engagement
Foam cavity fit Insert/remove candle — 10 cycles No tearing, cavity retains shape
Satin adhesion Manual peel test No lifting at edges or corners
Satin wrinkle check Visual under D50 lighting Wrinkle-free across entire surface
Foil adhesion Tape test per ASTM D3359 5B — no flaking
Print registration Overlay template ±0.15mm
Color consistency Spectrophotometer ΔE ≤2.0 from target
Surface inspection Visual under D50 lighting No scuffs, glue marks, or ink smudges

Why This Magnetic Candle Box vs Standard Rigid Box

The candle gift market has unique packaging requirements that standard rigid boxes don’t address. Here’s how Bincai’s magnetic candle box stacks up:

item.title: Magnetic Closure Rigid Box with Ribbon Pull for Luxury Stationery Sets
item.description:

item.title: Magnetic Closure Round Gift Box with Satin Lining — Cylindrical Premium Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s cylindrical magnetic closure gift box stands apart from standard rectangular packaging with its elegant 360°-printable round silhouette. The rigid 2.0mm greyboard tube is precision-rolled to ±0.5mm diameter tolerance with a seamless exterior wrap in 157gsm art paper — full CMYK offset printing covers the entire cylinder in a single continuous image. A precision-fit lid with embedded N42 neodymium magnets (≥8N pull force) provides invisible magnetic closure with a satisfying snap. The interior is lined with your choice of satin, velvet, suede, or electrostatic flocking. Available in 7 standard diameters from 80mm to 250mm with custom heights from 40mm to 300mm. Manufactured on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset with Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV and Bobst SP 102 BMA foil stamping at our 18,000 sqm ISO 9001:2015 & FSC certified facility in Foshan Guangdong. 23 years of rigid box craftsmanship since 2003 — 220,000+ boxes daily output.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Single-Door Gift Box with Ribbon Pull Premium
item.description:
Product Overview

The single-door magnetic closure gift box with ribbon pull elevates the unboxing experience to a ritual. A gentle tug on the satin ribbon releases the concealed neodymium magnets with a satisfying resistance — then the lid swings open like a fine book cover, revealing the velvet-flocked interior. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified factory with 23 years of rigid box expertise (founded 2003) — each box is hand-assembled by our 80+ skilled craftspeople using precision CNC-wrapped greyboard (1200-1600gsm), art paper (157gsm), and 3M-grade neodymium magnets rated for 10,000+ open/close cycles. Printing runs on KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press (15,000 sheets/hour) for mass-volume production and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press for specialty coatings and foil stamping. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with the 2025 8,000 sqm smart factory expansion produces 220,000+ rigid gift boxes daily.

item.title: Magnetic Closure Tea Set Gift Box with Custom Foam Insert

Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified factory with 23 years of packaging expertise — every box passes 12-point QC inspection including magnet pull-force verification (8-12N range), foam insert fitment tolerance check (±0.5mm), and lamination adhesion cross-hatch testing. Our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025) delivers 220,000+ gift boxes daily on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 press lines.

Production Quality & Testing

  • Heidelberg Prinect Inpress closed-loop color management
  • ΔE ≤ 2.0 color accuracy across production
  • Magnet pull-force testing at 3.5–5.5N per magnet pair

Sustainability & Compliance

Aspect Detail
Paper Sourcing FSC Chain-of-Custody certified — full traceability from forest to finished box
Recyclability Greyboard core and surface papers fully recyclable in standard paper/cardboard streams
Adhesive Water-based PVA adhesive — biodegradable, VOC-free, GB/T and EU compliant
Magnet Recovery Neodymium magnets removable for separate recycling stream — box body remains fully recyclable
Factoring Waste Closed-loop recycling program diverts 95%+ of production paper waste from landfill
Carbon LED factory lighting and optimized Heidelberg press scheduling minimize energy consumption

item.title: Magnetic Gift Box for Premium Electronics — Custom Rigid Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Manufactured in our Foshan smart factory (18,000 sqm total across two facilities) with Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset and KBA 1050 4-color presses. 80+ skilled workers, 23 years of packaging expertise since 2003.

item.title: Magnetic Lid Paper Box with Embossed Pattern Velvet Liner Premium
item.description:
Product Overview

The Magnetic Lid Paper Box with Embossed Pattern and Velvet Liner by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. represents the pinnacle of tactile luxury packaging for premium jewelry, cosmetics, fragrance, and high-end gift products. Established in 2003 and recognized in China Print & Packaging News among the top rigid-box manufacturers in South China, Bincai combines two decades of craftsmanship with a production capacity of 1.7 million color boxes and 220,000+ gift boxes daily across an 18,000 sqm dual-facility campus. Each box is built on a rigid greyboard chassis (1.5–3.0mm thickness) wrapped in fine art paper with deep multi-level embossing that creates a three-dimensional tactile pattern, while the interior is fully lined with plush velvet, flocking, or satin in your choice of over 40 colors. The lid closes with a satisfying magnetic snap — powered by recessed neodymium N42 or N52 magnets calibrated to 3–8N opening force — creating a premium unboxing ritual that communicates luxury, craftsmanship, and lasting brand value from the first touch.

item.title: Magnetic Luxury Watch Display Box
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Magnetic Luxury Watch Display Box delivers premium presentation for high-end timepieces. Manufactured in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with German-engineered Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color presses, each box combines structural integrity with refined aesthetics. The magnetic closure provides a satisfying snap-lock that keeps watches secure during display and transport.

Features

  • Magnetic Closure: Precision-aligned neodymium magnets embedded in 2.0mm greyboard, tested to 5,000+ open/close cycles without strength degradation
  • Velvet Interior: 1.5mm flocked cushion with die-cut watch cavity, available in black, navy, grey, and cream
  • Hot Stamping: Gold, silver, or rose gold foil logo on lid and spine
  • Custom Dimensions: Standard 120×80×60mm, customizable from 80×60×40mm to 250×180×80mm
  • Rigid Construction: 2.0-3.0mm greyboard wrapped in 157gsm art paper with matte lamination

Manufacturing Specifications

  • Press: Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color offset — rich solids on dark backgrounds, ±0.15mm registration
  • Board: 2.0–3.0mm rigid greyboard core (1200–1600gsm) wrapped in 157gsm art paper
  • Magnetic Closure: N35 neodymium magnets (2 pairs), concealed beneath wrap layer, tested 5,000+ cycles
  • Velvet Interior: 1.5mm flocked cushion with precision die-cut watch cavity and satin pillow
  • Foil Stamping: Gold, silver, or rose gold foil on lid and spine via Bobst flatbed hot stamping
  • Finishing: Matte lamination with optional spot UV logo highlight
  • Daily Output: 220,000+ gift boxes + 1.7M color boxes
  • Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody

Option Available Choices

Finish Matte lamination, gloss lamination, soft-touch, spot UV, linen texture

Production Quality

Test Standard Specification
Lid Alignment Internal ≤0.8mm gap tolerance
Magnet Pull Force Internal ≥4.5 N per magnet pair
Cavity Fit Internal ±0.5mm around watch dimension
Foil Registration Internal ±0.2mm
Drop Test ISTA 1A 10-drop sequence, 760mm
Print Registration Internal ±0.15mm
Hinge Durability Internal 10,000+ open/close cycles
